module_info.docstring: Structured MCP error contract — wire-format compatible with Go toolerror.

classes.name: ToolError
classes.docstring:
Structured error for MCP tool handlers.

Carries enough context for agents to make retry and fallback decisions.
Wire format matches Go's toolerror.ToolError exactly.

methods.name: with_recoverable
methods.docstring: Override the recoverable flag. Returns self for chaining.

methods.name: with_data
methods.docstring: Set data fields. Returns self for chaining.

methods.name: json
methods.docstring: Serialize to JSON wire format matching Go's encoding/json output.

methods.name: from_error
methods.docstring: Extract a ToolError from an exception. Returns None if not one.

methods.name: wrap
methods.docstring: Convert any exception to ToolError. Passthrough if already one.
